name: exam-monitoring-system
description: Professional Online Examination Monitoring System with AI-Powered Proctoring

scripts.build: npm run install-all && cd frontend && npm run build
scripts.build:production: npm run install-all && cd frontend && npm run build --config vite.config.production.js
scripts.lint: cd frontend && npm run lint && cd ../backend && npm run lint
scripts.lint:fix: cd frontend && npm run lint:fix && cd ../backend && npm run lint:fix
scripts.test: cd frontend && npm test && cd ../backend && npm test
scripts.security:audit: cd frontend && npm audit && cd ../backend && npm audit
scripts.security:fix: cd frontend && npm audit fix && cd ../backend && npm audit fix
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.install:production: npm install --production && cd frontend && npm install --production=false && cd ../backend && npm install --production
scripts.clean:install: npm run clean && npm run install-all

author: Exam Monitoring Team
